name: prgschedulemanager

assignResourceCommandVisiblity.expression: ((ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0PrgDelRevision') > -1) || ( ctx.mselected.length > 1 && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ItemRevision') > -1 && ( ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Timeline' && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ChangeItemRevision') === -1) || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Deliverables'|| (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Navigate' && ctx.locationContext.modelObject.type === 'Fnd0HomeFolder'))) || ((ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0ProgramRisk') > -1 || ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0ProgramOpp') > -1 || ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0ProgramIssue') > -1 || ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0Checklist') > -1 ) && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Overview'|| ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Overview' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Timeline' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Opportunities' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Risks' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Issues' || (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Checklists' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_apqp_Quality' || ctx.locationContext.modelObject.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0Checklist') > -1 )) || ((ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0ChecklistQuestion') > -1 && (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_ChecklistQuestion') || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_ChecklistQuestion'  )|| (ctx.locationContext.modelObject.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0ChecklistQuestion') > -1)))) && ( ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Qam0QualityAction') === -1 && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Apm0RYG') === -1 )

Psi0ProgramRelationCommandVisiblility.expression: ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ((ctx.mselected[0].modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ItemRevision') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Deliverables' || conditions.Psi0IsTimelinePrimaryXrtAndDeliverablesSecondaryXrt)) || (ctx.mselected[0].modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0AbsRIO') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Opportunities' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Risks' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Issues' || conditions.Psi0IsTimelinePrimaryXrtAndRIOSecondaryXrt )) || (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Schedule') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_eventSchedules' || conditions.Psi0IsTimelinePrimaryXrtAndScheduleSecondaryXrt )) || (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0Checklist') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Checklists' || conditions.Psi0IsTimelinePrimaryXrtAndChecklistSecondaryXrt )) || ((ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ChangeRequestRevision') > -1 && ctx.pselected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Prg0AbsPlan') > -1) || (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ChangeNoticeRevision') > -1 && ctx.pselected.type === 'Prg0Event') && ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Changes') || (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Prg0AbsCriteria') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Criteria' || conditions.Psi0IsTimelinePrimaryXrtAndCriteriaSecondaryXrt )))

Psi0AbsChecklistDisableSummaryWhenNoObje.expression: conditions.isStartEditGroupCommandAllowed && conditions.isNoneContextActive && ctx.visibleServerCommands.Awp0StartEdit && ctx['NONE'].canStartEdit() && ctx.ViewModeContext.ViewModeContext === 'TableSummaryView' && (((ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Checklists' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_apqp_Quality') && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Prg0AbsEvent') > -1 ) || (ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_ChecklistQuestion' && ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0Checklist') > -1))

Psi0ReplaceRevisionCmdVisibility.expression: (ctx.selected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ItemRevision') > -1 && ( ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Deliverables' || ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_prgDeliverables' || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_Deliverables' || ctx.xrtPageContext.secondaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_prgDeliverables' ) && ctx.mselected.length === 1 && ctx.pselected && ( ctx.pselected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('Psi0PrgDelRevision') < 0 || (ctx.pselected.modelType.typeHierarchyArray.indexOf('ItemRevision') > -1 && ctx.pselected.props.date_released !== undefined && ctx.pselected.props.date_released.dbValues[0] === null))) && ((commandContext.objectSetSource==='Psi0EventPrgDel.Psi0PrgDelRevision,Psi0EventPrgDel.ItemRevision' || commandContext.objectSetSource==='Psi0PlanPrgDel.Psi0PrgDelRevision,Psi0PlanPrgDel.ItemRevision') || (commandContext.objectSetSource==='Psi0DelInstances.Dataset,Psi0DelInstances.WorkspaceObject' && ctx.xrtPageContext.primaryXrtPageID === 'tc_xrt_prgDeliverables'))
